accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; the CRA reference and DOI/NPS context are accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the Congressional Review Act and Department of the Interior context are correct.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves the NPS Glen Canyon motor vehicles rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately notes it does not amend underlying statutes but nullifies the rule via the CRA.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no exceptions or conditions, as the summary correctly notes.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the resolution was approved May 23, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential effect: disapproval rendering the rule of no force or effect.

concise.why: Brief and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the NPS, Department of the Interior, and the CRA.

correct_figures.why: The Federal Register citation (90 Fed. Reg. 2621) and date are correct.
